generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.com/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.com/DTDFVocab#
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214x214x3 mm heatbed actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for precise heating control"
]
instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow rate of 0.02 m³/s controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB for airflow management"
]
instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current isolation and signal decoupling"
]
instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]
instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller"
]
instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models used to inform control decisions"
]
instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for temperature deviations beyond safe thresholds"
]
instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for heating duration and airflow based on temperature predictions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance UpdatedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters from calibration process for improved accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and Model B)",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and operational optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, ControlAction
]
instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms to update model parameters based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedModelParameters
]
instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication channel for sensor data ingestion",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]
instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization and parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService
]
instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for software implementation and version control",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]
instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for hardware control enabling real-time monitoring and actuation",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor mounted on heatbed for measuring heating element temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]
instance ContainerInternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor inside styrofoam container measuring internal air temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]
instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring external ambient temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor, ContainerInternalTemperatureSensor, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal energy balance model with 2 parameters",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]
instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, ContainerInternalTemperatureSensor, ExternalTemperatureSensor, PCB, PowerSupply, RaspberryPi4ModelB
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which then actuates the heatbed and fan through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-based communication architecture where DT components (models, algorithms) listen to messages between the controller and low-level driver, forming a unified system for data processing and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation via temperature uniformity tests (three sensors), residual error minimization during calibration using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver, and comparison of model predictions against experimental data (e.g., Model B better captures thermal inertia of the heatbed)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol over Ethernet/Wi-Fi via Raspberry Pi's built-in networking, with message-based communication between components using publish-subscribe patterns."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT software (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) is deployed on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B single-board computer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implementation of a safe protocol in the low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation, preventing unsafe states through controlled hardware interactions and isolation of control signals via optocouplers."
]
